name: Unbaked Caramel Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, butter, and evaporated milk in a saucepan.
2. Stir over low heat until the mixture comes to a full rolling boil.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the pudding mix and oatmeal until thoroughly combined.
4. Allow to cool for 15 minutes.
5. Drop by rounded spoonfuls onto wax paper-lined cookie sheets.
6. Bake until set, about 350°F (175°C).
